content.verdict: Pink Sands sits directly on the three-mile pink-sand beach that travel magazines have voted the world's best for two decades — 25 cottages tucked into tropical gardens with that iconic India Hicks boho-chic spirit still humming through the property. It's the most romantic address on Harbour Island and arguably in the entire Bahamas.
content.best_room: Book a One-Bedroom Garden Cottage on the ocean side — private terrace, outdoor shower, and a 90-second walk to the pink sand. The Sea View cottages add panoramic Atlantic angles. Skip the smaller standard rooms for a honeymoon stay.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival and Blue Bar dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into North Eleuthera, ferry across to Harbour Island (10 minutes), golf-cart transfer to Pink Sands. Settle into your cottage, sunset cocktails on the pink sand, dinner at Blue Bar — the resort's beachfront restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Pink Sands Beach all day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow morning at the famous beach with cabana service, frozen drinks, and a swim in calm Atlantic water. Lunch at Blue Bar, afternoon nap, dinner at Sip Sip on the bluff for grilled lobster and conch chowder.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dunmore Town and golf cart day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Rent a golf cart (the only way to get around) and wander Dunmore Town — pastel cottages, Bay Street boutiques, ice cream at Arthur's Bakery. Lunch at Coral Sands' Beach Bar next door, dinner at The Landing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Bonefishing or boat charter
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day bonefishing on the flats with a local guide, or full-day private boat charter to nearby cays — snorkel, swim with reef sharks, lunch on board. Dinner at Rock House Restaurant in town.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa and beachfront sunset
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples massage at the resort spa in late morning, lunch at the pool. Afternoon at the beach, golf-cart sunset run to the Lone Tree (the iconic photo spot), Champagne dinner-for-two on the sand arranged by the resort.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Day trip to Eleuthera
itinerary_7_nights.description: Ferry back across to the main island, drive to Glass Window Bridge and Lighthouse Beach. Lunch at Tippy's beach restaurant in Banks Road. Return for cocktails at Blue Bar and dinner at Ma Ruby's for cracked conch.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final morning and farewell
itinerary_7_nights.description: Breakfast in your cottage garden, last hour at the pink sand, late checkout. Lunch at Blue Bar, golf-cart back to the dock, ferry and short flight home.

caveats: Pink Sands operates on island time — service is warm and personal but not crisp-resort fast.
Harbour Island is small and dense; you'll see other guests and locals constantly. If you want total seclusion, The Cove Eleuthera or Kamalame Cay deliver more privacy.
Atlantic swells can pick up December through February — most days are calm but occasional rough surf days happen.

faqs.question: Is the pink sand really pink?
faqs.answer: Yes — it's a soft blush color from crushed red foraminifera shells, most visible in early morning and late afternoon light. Most people are surprised by how genuinely pink it looks.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into North Eleuthera Airport (ELH), short taxi to the dock, public or private ferry to Harbour Island (5-10 minutes), then golf-cart transfer to Pink Sands. Total transit from arrival is about 30 minutes.

faqs.question: How does Pink Sands compare to Coral Sands?
faqs.answer: Pink Sands is more spread out across tropical gardens, more boho-chic in vibe, with larger garden cottages. Coral Sands is smaller, closer to Dunmore Town, more nautical-preppy. Both sit on the same beach.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — but the property is overwhelmingly couples and the cottage layout means you rarely encounter other guests outside of meals.

faqs.question: Best time of year?
faqs.answer: Mid-November to early December and mid-April to early June. Avoid mid-August through October for hurricane risk and February for occasional Atlantic swells.

faqs.question: What's the dress code at Blue Bar?
faqs.answer: Casual chic — a sundress or linen shirt and shorts is fine for dinner. Sip Sip and Rock House are similarly relaxed.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking inquiry — Pink Sands Resort Harbour Island

Hello,

We are planning our honeymoon at Pink Sands and would like to enquire about a 7-night stay in a One-Bedroom Garden Cottage, Sea View if available.

Could you please confirm:
- Honeymoon package inclusions (Champagne, dinner credit, spa credit, room upgrade if available)
- Daily breakfast arrangements (in-cottage delivery or restaurant)
- Sunset Champagne dinner-on-the-sand pricing
- Bonefishing and private boat charter pricing
- Ferry and golf-cart transfer arrangements from North Eleuthera Airport

Thank you,
content.extra_notes: Pink Sands' garden cottages are spaced through about 18 acres of tropical landscape — request a Sea View if available, or at minimum an ocean-side row to minimize the walk to the beach. The resort's golf carts are complimentary for guest use around the property.
